mapper.select: SELECT id, year, title, summary, image_url FROM t_event WHERE MATCH(title, summary) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE) ORDER BY year ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, name, subtitle, dynasty, image_url FROM t_historical_figure WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR subtitle LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR dynasty LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY CASE WHEN name = #{keyword} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
